displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
1. Add egg noodles into 1000ml of boiling water
2. Cook the egg noodles in hot water until it is soft
3. Add garnish of your choice
4. A bowl of traditional egg noodles soup is ready to be served

metaData.Key Information:
• Have your noodles fried; with meat gravy or just in soup
• No preservatives and colouring
metaData.Preparation:
1. Cook noodles in boiling water for about 2 minutes
2. Stir until noodle cake loosens
3. Drain the hot water and rinse noodles thoroughly in clear cold water
4. Then serve in your favourite recipe

product.description: Treat yourselves to the light and healthy taste of Koka noodles.

metaData.Key Information:
• Cooked through a fully-automatic, steaming and air-drying process
• Suitable for vegetarians
• Cholesterol-free
• No preservatives and colouring
metaData.Preparation:
1. Cook noodles in boiling water for 2 - 3 minutes
2. Rinse cooked noodles thoroughly in clear cold water for dry or cold dishes
3. Drain immediately
4. Serve with your favourite recipe

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodle Cake: Wheat Flour, Palm Oil, Salt, Potassium Chloride, Guar Gum, Sodium Tripolyphosphate, Potassium Carbonate, Sodium Carbonate
• Soup Mix: Salt, Monosodium Glutamate, Palm Oil, Starch, Potassium Chloride, Sugar, Chilli, Wheat Flour, Yeast, Garlic, Maltodextrin, Coriander, Flavourings (contain soya), Sodium Inosinate and Sodium Guanylate, Onion, Cumin, Citric Acid, Aniseed, Tumeric, Caramel, Ginger, Fenugreek, Canola Oil, Clove, Cardamom, Nutmeg, Paprika Guar Gum, Anti-caking Agent (E551).
• May contain: Crustaceans, Fish, Milk, Celery and Mustard
metaData.Key Information: Made with 11 secret spices infused with real chillies that are slow cooked to perfection, it is no surprise why this is every Singaporeans’ favourite. Serve with fresh vegetables for a delicious and more balanced meal for the whole family.
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
• For Soup
1. Bring 2 cups of water (350ml) to boil
2. Add in noodle cake, soup mix and protein & vegetables of your choice
3. Cook for 2 minutes and enjoy!
• For Dry
1. Cook noodle cake for 1 minute and drain off the water
2. Fry noodles with soup mix and protein & vegetables of your choice
3. Enjoy!

metaData.Key Information:
• Served as fried noodles without soup
• Ready in 3 minutes, flavourful and convenient
metaData.Preparation:
1. Cook noodles in 400ml boiling water and simmer for 3 minutes
2. Mix the seasoning powder, seasoning oil, sweet soy sauce and chili sauce on a plate, while noodles are being cooked
3. Drain well
4. Mix well with all the seasonings
5. Garnish with fried onions and enjoy your delicious fried noodles

product.name: Indomie Mi Goreng Instant Noodles - Special

offers.description: Buy 1 Indomie Mi Goreng Instant Noodles - Special @ $2.30

metaData.Key Information: Myojo Instant Noodles feature authentic local flavours satisfying cravings for generations. Myojo first launch in the Singapore market more than 40 years ago and continues to be the best seller today. Some of the uniquely available unique flavours include Thai Tom Yam, Chicken Abalone, Korean Kimchi, Curry Chicken, Shrimp Tanmen, Chilli Crab, Prawn Noodles, Char Mee and Mee Poh. One can now enjoy hawker fares at the comforts of their own home. What’s more, this range is Halal certified to cater to all. So now everyone can enjoy Myojo! What are you waiting for? Try them all today!
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
1. Put noodles into 450ml of boiling water in a pot and boil
2. Cook for 4 minutes
3. Remove pot from heat and put seasoning powder to the noodles
4. Mix well and serve immediately

offers.description: Buy 1 Myojo Instant Noodles - Chicken Abalone @ $2.45

metaData.Ingredients:

• Seasoning Powder: Salt, Spices, Monosodium Glutamate, Yeast Extract, Permitted Flavour Enhancer (E631)

metaData.Key Information: A dry based premium quality instant noodle made with high protein flour. Springy noodles are paired with oriental sweet soya sauce and sesame oil, giving it a distinctive flavour that is impossible to resist.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Cook noodles in briskly boiling water and simmer for 3 minutes
2. Mix the seasoning powder, oil and soy sauce on a separate plate
3. Take noodles out from the boiling water and drain well
4. Mix noodles thoroughly with the seasonings
5. Noodles are ready to be served

product.description: Non-fried, thick, round & straight noodles, as good as hand-made. Smooth & firm noodle texture with good standing quality. Soup base made with cooking paste not seasoning powder. Good for creating gourmet meals.

metaData.Ingredients:
(1) Noodles / Lamian (55%)
Wheat Flour, Salt, Acidity Regulators (500I, 339Ii), Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin)
(2) Soup Base
Palm Olein, Chilli Paste (Water, Dried Chilli, Salt), Dried Shrimp (Crustacean), Water, Shallot, Galangal, Shrimp Paste (Crustacean) [Shrimp (Crustacean), Salt], Turmeric, Turmeric Powder, Lemon Grass, Laksa Leaf, Chilli, White Pepper Powder, Acidity Regulator (327), Chilli Powder
(3) Premix
Coconut Milk Powder (15.2%) [Coconut Milk Solids, Maltodextrin, Sodium Caseinate (Milk)], Salt, Sugar, Skim Milk Powder, Yeast Extract, Acidity Regulator (330)

Contains Milk, Crustacean, Soy, Wheat and Gluten. May Contain Peanut, Sesame, Fish, Tree Nut, Mollusc, Egg and Lupin.
metaData.Key Information: Premium noodle in aromatic mild spicy coconut broth. Noodle soup using authentic cooking paste
metaData.Preparation: Add soup base and premix into 400ml water, bring to boil. Add noodles and low boil for 7 minutes.
